subject: physics
title: Recoil speed (momentum conservation)
given: a 5.0 kg rifle fires a 0.020 kg bullet
bullet leaves at 400 m/s; rifle initially at rest
find: the recoil speed of the rifle
steps: Total momentum is conserved and starts at zero: 0 = m_b·v_b + m_r·v_r.
v_r = −1.6 m/s (the minus sign means opposite to the bullet).
